---
title: "Cameron Scholl"
subtitle: "EEB PhD Candidate"
image: /images/portraits/cameron-scholl.jpg
role: phd
weight: 4
aliases: ["Cameron Scholl", "Cameron J. Scholl", "C. Scholl", "C Scholl", "Cameron Coles", "C. Coles", "C Coles"]
about:
  template: trestles
  image-shape: round
  links:
    - icon: envelope
      text: Email
      href: "mailto:cjc378@cornell.edu"
    - icon: github
      text: GitHub
      href: "https://github.com/camjay99"
---

I am interested in the use of remote sensing in identifying the extent and
intensity of defoliation, as well as predicting the drivers and long-term impacts
of spongy moth outbreaks.
